observe.description: What you see on screen RIGHT NOW. Mention element names, window titles, values, focus state. ONLY from SCREEN section. Min 50 words.

reason.description: Why this action. Reference elements, goal, next_step. If retrying, explain what failed and what's different. Min 50 words.

actions.description: One or more actions to execute in sequence. Each must be: 'click <ID>', 'double_click <ID>', 'type <ID> <text>', 'press <keys>', or 'done'. Chain related actions (e.g. type then press enter). Execution stops at first failure or 'done'.

expect.description: What screen looks like AFTER all actions execute. Be specific and falsifiable. Min 50 words.

extended_observation_needed.description: True only if you need UI trees of windows not currently shown.

developer_feedback.description: Honest self-critique. What confused you? What's missing? Used to improve your prompt.
